title: T-012 — API: BOM list and detail (GET /api/technical/items/:code/boms[, /:version])
prompt: Implement GET /api/technical/items/[item_code]/boms (list versions for an item) and GET /api/technical/items/[item_code]/boms/[version] (header + lines + co_products joined). Per §7.1, ordering: list newest version first; detail returns flattened BOM JSON identical in shape to bom_snapshots.snapshot_json. Org-scoped (RLS). RED tests/api/bom-read.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/bom-read.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: BOM list per item and BOM detail (flattened header+lines+co-products) endpoints.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use Drizzle joins. Detail response keys: header, lines, co_products. Shape matches snapshot_json contract so the same renderer can be reused for snapshots viewer (TEC-025).
acceptance_criteria: Given item has BOM v1 and v2, when GET /boms, then v2 returns first.
Given BOM v1 has 3 lines + 1 co-product, when GET /boms/1, then JSON includes header + 3 lines + 1 co_product entry.
Given org B requests org A BOM, when GET runs, then 404 due to RLS.
test_strategy: RED tests cross-org RLS + JSON shape matches snapshot_json contract.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass RLS via privileged client.
Do not include audit-only fields in response.
